pysnap.cli package¶

CLI helpers for PySnap.

Submodules¶

pysnap.cli.app module¶

Command line interface for PySnap.

exception pysnap.cli.app.ParserExit(status=0)[source]¶

Bases: Exception

Represent a controlled parser exit.

Parameters:

status (int)

Return type:

None

class pysnap.cli.app.CliArgumentParser(*args, stdout=None, stderr=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ArgumentParser

Route argparse output through caller-provided streams.

Parameters:

  • args (object)

  • stdout (TextIO | None)

  • stderr (TextIO | None)

  • kwargs (object)

exit(status=0, message=None)[source]¶

Raise a controlled parser exit instead of terminating the process.

Parameters:

  • status (int) – Exit status code.

  • message (str | None) – Optional exit message.

Raises:

ParserExit – Always raised with the requested status.

Return type:

None

pysnap.cli.app.build_root_parser(stdout=None, stderr=None)[source]¶

Build the root CLI parser used for help output.

Parameters:

  • stdout (TextIO | None) – Stream used for help output.

  • stderr (TextIO | None) – Stream used for parser errors.

Returns:

Configured argument parser.

Return type:

CliArgumentParser

pysnap.cli.app.run_cli(argv=None, service=None, stdout=None, stderr=None)[source]¶

Execute the CLI.

Parameters:

  • argv (Sequence[str] | None) – Command line arguments without the executable name.

  • service (PySnapService | None) – Optional application service.

  • stdout (TextIO | None) – Output stream for regular messages.

  • stderr (TextIO | None) – Output stream for errors.

Returns:

Process exit code.

Return type:

int

pysnap.cli.app.main(argv=None)[source]¶

Program entry point.

Parameters:

argv (Sequence[str] | None) – Optional command line arguments.

Returns:

Process exit code.

Return type:

int

pysnap.cli.formatters module¶

Output formatters used by the PySnap CLI.

class pysnap.cli.formatters.ImportProgressBar(stream, label='Importing', width=32, current_percent=0, started=False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Render a live import progress bar to a text stream.

Parameters:

  • stream (TextIO)

  • label (str)

  • width (int)

  • current_percent (int)

  • started (bool)

stream: TextIO¶
label: str = 'Importing'¶
width: int = 32¶
current_percent: int = 0¶
started: bool = False¶
update(percent)[source]¶

Update the progress bar.

Parameters:

percent (int) – Percentage reported by VBoxManage.

Return type:

None

finish()[source]¶

Terminate the progress-bar line when it was shown.

Return type:

None

pysnap.cli.formatters.format_groups(groups)[source]¶

Format a group listing for terminal output.

Parameters:

groups (list[VMGroup]) – Group objects to format.

Returns:

Human-readable text output.

Return type:

str

pysnap.cli.formatters.format_vm_info(vm_info)[source]¶

Format one VM description for terminal output.

Parameters:

vm_info (VMInfo) – VM information to format.

Returns:

Human-readable text output.

Return type:

str

pysnap.cli.formatters.format_import_result(imported_vms)[source]¶

Format the result of an appliance import.

Parameters:

imported_vms (list[VMInfo]) – Imported VM information objects.

Returns:

Human-readable text output.

Return type:

str

pysnap.cli.formatters.format_integration_test_result(result)[source]¶

Format the result of a completed integration test run.

Parameters:

result (IntegrationTestResult) – Integration test result to render.

Returns:

Human-readable text output.

Return type:

str

pysnap.cli.formatters.format_monitor_records(records)[source]¶

Format compact runtime records for the monitor command.

Parameters:

records (list[VMMonitorRecord]) – Monitor records to format.

Returns:

Human-readable text output.

Return type:

str
